10532432.title: Amol Rajan Interviews Sundar Pichai
10532432.description: Amol Rajan talks to Google's CEO, Sundar Pichai, at his Silicon Valley HQ. They tackle a range of topical issues, from the company's hotly-debated privacy practices and tax policies to its pioneering development in AI and quantum computing.
